title: LOTR Survival
description: Official Mod Pack for the LOTR Survival server!
body:
![LOTR Survival Banner](https://cdn.lotrmc.net/webbanner.png)

# LOTR Survival - Official Modpack

The official recommended modpack for **LOTR Survival**, one of the most popular and stable Legacy LOTR Mod servers — serving the Middle-earth community since 2017.

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.lotrmc.net/discordbutton.png)](https://lotrmc.net/discord) [![Help Center](https://cdn.lotrmc.net/HelpCenterbutton.png)](https://lotrmc.net/help) [![LOTR Mod Wiki](https://cdn.lotrmc.net/lotrmodbutton.png)](https://lotrminecraftmod.fandom.com/wiki/The_Lord_of_the_Rings_Minecraft_Mod_Wiki) [![Download](https://cdn.lotrmc.net/downloadbutton.png)](https://lotrmc.net/join)

---

## About LOTR Survival

LOTR Survival combines the power of the Legacy LOTR Mod with custom mechanics carefully tailored for an engaging multiplayer experience. Whether you're a casual explorer or a dedicated conqueror, there's something for everyone in Middle-earth.

When you join, the choice is yours: explore the vast landscapes of Middle-earth, battle NPCs and players, design stunning builds, or dive into our flagship territory conquest system.

**Server IP:** `lotrmc.net`

**Version:** Minecraft 1.7.10 with Legacy LOTR Mod (Latest Version)

---

## Server Features

All custom features are coded from scratch — no extra mods required on the server side.

### Conquest System
Our flagship territory warfare system where factions battle for control of the realm:

- **Territory Sieges** — Functioning battering rams and war machines
- **Territory Claiming** — Automated system, no forms needed
- **Interactive Conquest Map** — View territories live online at [lotrmc.net/map](https://lotrmc.net/map)
- **Spontaneous Raids** — Fully automated raiding system
- **Factions & Wars** — Full-scale organized PvP warfare with up to 50 players per side

### War Machines
Deploy devastating siege equipment in battle:

- Catapults
- Ballistas
- Hwachas
- Cannons
- Oil Cauldrons
- Battering Rams

### Dungeons
Challenge yourself in custom-designed dungeons filled with unique bosses, puzzles, and rare loot:

- **Paths of the Dead** — Face the cursed army of the mountain
- **Shelob's Lair** — Confront the ancient spider of Cirith Ungol
- Interactive and re-playable encounters
- Earn unique loot including coins, scrolls, and abilities

### LSX (LOTR Survival Experience)
Exclusive custom content unavailable anywhere else:

- Custom weapons and armor
- Unique abilities system
- Character progression systems
- Middle-earth themed content

### Additional Features

- **LSC (LOTR Survival Coins)** — Server economy system
- **Daily Challenges** — Fresh objectives every day
- **Lore Items** — Collectible artifacts from Middle-earth's history
- **Duels** — 1v1 combat system
- **Parties** — Team up with friends
- **Happy Hour** — Bonus events
- **Juggernaut** — Special game mode
- **Raven Messages** — In-game mail system
- **Creative Plotworld** — Build freely in protected plots
- **Player Protection** — Safeguard your builds and items
- **Custom Crafting Recipes** — Server-exclusive recipes
- **Custom Paintings** — Unique decorations

---

## What's Included

This modpack contains all the recommended client-side mods for the best LOTR Survival experience, including:

- The Lord of the Rings Mod (Legacy)
- Performance optimization mods
- Quality-of-life improvements
- Compatible utility mods

Simply install and connect to `lotrmc.net` to begin your adventure.

---

## Getting Started

1. Download and install this modpack
2. Launch Minecraft through your preferred launcher
3. Connect to `lotrmc.net`
4. Choose your faction and begin your journey

New to the LOTR Mod? Check out our [Quick Start Guide](https://lotrmc.net/help) and the [LOTR Mod Wiki](https://lotrminecraftmod.fandom.com/wiki/The_Lord_of_the_Rings_Minecraft_Mod_Wiki).

---

## Community & Support

Join our active community of thousands of players from around the world.

**Useful Links:**

- [Help Center](https://lotrmc.net/help) — Comprehensive guides and documentation
- [Discord Server](https://lotrmc.net/discord) — Community chat and support
- [Conquest Map](https://lotrmc.net/map) — Live territory map
- [Player Stats](https://lotrmc.net/stats) — Track your progress
- [Store](https://lotrmc.net/store) — Support the server

---

## Server Statistics

- Serving Middle-earth since **2017**
- **~7,000** unique players
- **80,000+** lines of custom code
- Active development and regular updates

---

*LOTR Survival is not affiliated with Mojang Studios or the Tolkien Estate. The Lord of the Rings and all related content are property of their respective owners.*

- [LunatriusCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lunatriuscore) by Lunatrius

Inventory-Tweaks
